subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: List containers in a storage account

options.name: --prefix
options.description: Filter the results to return only containers whose name begins with the specified prefix

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.description: Show the properties of a container in a storage account

subcommands.name: vm
subcommands.description: Manage Linux or Windows virtual machines

options.name: --image
options.description: The name of the operating system image as a URN alias, URN, custom image name or ID

options.name: --size
options.description: The VM size to be created

options.name: --admin-password
options.description: Password for the VM if authentication type is 'Password'

options.name: --authentication-type
options.description: Type of authentication to use with the VM

name: -l
--location
options.description: Location in which to create VM and related resources

options.name: --ssh-key-values
options.description: Space-separated list of SSH public keys or public key file paths

options.name: --generate-ssh-keys
options.description: Generate SSH public and private key files if missing

options.name: --vnet-name
options.description: Name of the virtual network when creating a new one or referencing an existing one

options.name: --subnet
options.description: The name of the subnet when creating a new VNet or referencing an existing one

options.name: --nsg
options.description: The name to use when creating a new Network Security Group or referencing an existing one

options.name: --public-ip-address
options.description: Name of the public IP address when creating one or referencing an existing one

options.name: --nics
options.description: Names or IDs of existing NICs to attach to the VM

options.name: --os-disk-size-gb
options.description: OS disk size in GB to create

options.name: --data-disk-sizes-gb
options.description: Space-separated empty managed data disk sizes in GB to create

options.name: --custom-data
options.description: Custom init script file or text (cloud-init, cloud-config, etc.)

options.name: --no-wait
options.description: Do not wait for the long-running operation to finish

options.name: --assign-identity
options.description: Accept system or user assigned identities separated by spaces

options.name: --zones
options.description: Space-separated list of availability zones into which to provision the resource

name: -n
--name
options.description: The name of the Virtual Machine

options.description: Do not wait for the long-running operation to finish

--show-details

--name

--plan

--runtime
options.description: Canonicalized web runtime in the format of Framework:Version

--deployment-container-image-name

options.description: Linux only. The web's startup file

subcommands.description: Open a web app in a browser

options.description: Set the OS type for the app

--runtime
options.description: Canonicalized web runtime in the format of Framework:Version

options.description: Name of the appserviceplan associated with the webapp

subcommands.description: Start live log tracing for a web app

options.name: --provider
options.description: By default all live traces configured by az webapp log config will be shown

subcommands.name: download
subcommands.description: Download a web app's log history as a zip file

options.name: --log-file
options.description: The downloaded zipped log file path

subcommands.name: source
subcommands.description: Manage web app deployment via source control
